title: sedum rupestre subsp. ochroleucum
intro: Sedum rupestre subsp. ochroleucum, also known as yellow-leaved stonecrop, is a succulent plant species belonging to the genus Sedum and family Crassulaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits associated with Sedum rupestre subsp. ochroleucum include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil, and it has also been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
